title: StickyNotePaper
description: This resource pack replaces the paper texture with a yellow sticky note.
body:
This resource pack replaces the Minecraft Paper item texture with a sticky note design. Paper appears as a small yellow note in the inventory and hotbar, making it easier to spot at a glance.

The pack only changes the Paper item sprite. No blocks, GUIs, fonts, or other items are modified, so it stays compatible with most other packs and won’t affect gameplay. Use it on its own or layer it over a larger resource pack if you just want the Paper icon changed.

Designed for players who prefer clearer inventory icons or a simple “note” look for builds and roleplay setups.

TIP: Use as real sticky notes! Remember your tasks by renaming the papers :)

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd304e8ac00cecb61e818259d04124a1a66293a7.png)
